task_completion.description: Navigate to the outgoing sales section in the trade module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre web interface is visible with the Trade module and Outgoing Sales (or equivalent French term like 'Ventes') section active.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new outgoing sale
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or dialog for creating a new sale is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select an existing client for the sale
task_completion.visual_evidence: The client/customer field in the sale form is populated with a name or entity, indicating an existing client was selected.

task_completion.description: Add a sale line for a grain or cereal product variant
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sale line item is visible with a product selected that is a grain or cereal (e.g., wheat, corn, barley, or their French equivalents like blé, maïs, orge).

task_completion.description: Set the quantity of the product to 25
task_completion.visual_evidence: The quantity field for the sale line is set to a value between 24.5 and 25.5.

task_completion.description: Set the unit pretax price to 210.00 EUR
task_completion.visual_evidence: The unit pretax price (prix unitaire HT) field for the sale line is set to a value between 209.00 and 211.00.

task_completion.description: Save and create the outgoing sale
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Sale created successfully') is displayed, or the screen shows the saved, read-only view of the newly created sale record.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to create the sale
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Ekylibre web interface in a browser, rather than API requests or database commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Ekylibre application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Ekylibre layout and branding, not a generic text editor or a locally mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent running Ruby on Rails console commands or direct SQL inserts in the terminal to create the sale record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses real farm data from GAEC JOULIN. When verifying the sale line, apply the following verified tolerances: Quantity must be between 24.5 and 25.5 (target 25 ± 0.5). Unit pretax price must be between 209.00 and 211.00 EUR (target 210.00 ± 1.0).
